task_summary: SP1 scaffold mew-companion-log with README, runnable fixture-driven markdown CLI, fixture, and focused tests.
notes: Mew inspected the empty target directory, then twice attempted to scaffold under experiments/mew-companion-log. The write-ready/compiler guard rejected the side-project paired source/test paths with: write batch is limited to write/edit tools under tests/** and src/mew/** with at least one of each. The second attempt used --model gpt-5.5 and explicit steer that experiments/mew-companion-log was the valid product scope. No product files were written and Codex did not rescue the implementation. Problem issue: https://github.com/mkXultra/mew/issues/1.
